messages.content: Create a MQL4 indicator code to display three LWMAs with different colors of the periods: 3, 6 and 9 with the names MA1, MA2, MA3. Create an array with the price values of all MAs and sort them and calculate the difference and display that difference number continuously on the chart. Compare the difference in pips with a extern input called "Max_MA_Range" and if the difference is less or equal to the Max_MA_Range, draw a range box around the area where the MAs are within the range of the difference. Draw a text saying "BREAKOUT" and send a notification to mobile when price closes outside of this box.
mql4 code that you generated, gives the error "constant expression required". Please correct code: double sortedMA[3] = {line1[i], line2[i], line3[i]};
mql4 code that you generated, gives the error “'ObjectsTotal' - ambiguous call to overloaded function with the same parameters”. Please correct code: for(int i = ObjectsTotal(0) - 1; i >= 0; i--)

My apologies for the oversight. Please find the corrected line below:

Replace this line:

```cpp
for(int i = ObjectsTotal(0) - 1; i >= 0; i--){
```

With the following line:

```cpp
for(int i = ObjectsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--){
```

By removing the "(0)" parameter, the error should be resolved.
the above code gives a warning that needs to be corrected, that "function must return a value" for the line:    if (rates_total < 1) return;

I apologize for the oversight in the previous response. You can correct the warning by replacing the line:

```cpp
if (rates_total < 1) return;
```

With the following line:

```cpp
if (rates_total < 1) return(0);
```

Now, the code should compile without any warnings.

the above code displays a "Difference" of zero pips all the time, which seems wrong. Please correct the bug, to actually display the difference in pips between the two most furthest away moving averages in the array. Indicate the lines that needs to be corrected and how. Also, let the MAs be visible with different colors on chart.
The above code has two errors that needs to be corrected. Error 1: SetIndexColor - function not defined. Error 2: MathMax - Wrong parameters count.
The above code doesn't calculate the current  "difference" between the MAs most further away from eachother that is supposed to be displayed on the chart at all time.
The above code gives 4 errors: GetCurrentHighestMA and GetCurrentLowestMA - function not defined, and function declarations are allowed on global, namespace or class scope only.
Double check this MQL4 code to work perfectly:

To thoroughly review and test the code, it would be beneficial to have the entire script. Could you please provide the complete MQL4 code so that I can check for any errors and ensure proper functionality?
The above code should display all 3 MAs but displays only the first one. I also doesn't seem to display the difference between the furtherest away MAs.
